# my-project

## Build & Test Commands

- Build: `npm run build`
- Test: `npm run test`
- Lint: `npm run lint`
- Type check: `npm run typecheck`
- Dev: `npm run dev`

## Tech Stack

- Language: typescript
- Runtime: node
- Package Manager: npm
- Testing: vitest
- Linter: biome

## Code Style

- Use 2 spaces for indentation
- Single quotes
- No semicolons

## Naming Conventions

- Files: kebab-case
- Functions: camelCase
- Constants: UPPER_SNAKE_CASE
- Types: PascalCase
